lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਦਿਤੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਤੇਹੋ ਜੇਹਾ ਧਰਮੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tin ke dite naanakaa teho jehaa dharam |1|
lines.english: Whoever gives to them, O Nanak, earns the same sort of merit. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭਿਆਗਤ ਏਹ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਭਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: abhiaagat eeh na aakheeeh jin kai man meh bharam |
lines.english: Do not call the wandering beggars holy men, if their minds are filled with doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭੈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਭੀਖਕੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: abhai niranjan param pad taa kaa bheekhak hoe |
lines.english: One who begs for the supreme status of the Fearless and Immaculate Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis kaa bhojan naanakaa viralaa paae koe |2|
lines.english: - how rare are those who have the opportunity, O Nanak, to give food to such a person. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵਾ ਪੰਡਿਤੁ ਜੋਤਕੀ ਵੇਦ ਪੜਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hovaa panddit jotakee ved parraa mukh chaar |
lines.english: If I were a religious scholar, an astrologer, or one who could recite the four Vedas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵਾ ਖੰਡਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਾਣੀਆ ਅਪਨੇ ਚਜ ਵੀਚਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: navaa khanddaa vich jaaneea apane chaj veechaar |3|
lines.english: I could be famous throughout the nine regions of the earth, for my wisdom and thoughtful contemplation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣ ਕੈਲੀ ਘਾਤੁ ਕੰਞਕਾ ਅਣਚਾਰੀ ਕਾ ਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: brahaman kailee ghaat kanyakaa anachaaree kaa dhaan |
lines.english: The four Hindu cardinal sins of murdering a Brahmin, a cow, a female infant, and acceptance of the offerings of an evil person,

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਟਕ ਫਿਟਕਾ ਕੋੜੁ ਬਦੀਆ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: fittak fittakaa korr badeea sadaa sadaa abhimaan |
lines.english: cursed by the world and diseased by leprosy; he is forever and ever filled with egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਹਿ ਏਤੇ ਜਾਹਿ ਵੀਸਰਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਇਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: paeh ete jaeh veesar naanakaa ik naam |
lines.english: One who forgets the Naam, O Nanak, is covered by these sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਬੁਧੀ ਜਾਲੀਅਹਿ ਇਕੁ ਰਹੈ ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabh budhee jaaleeeh ik rahai tat giaan |4|
lines.english: Let all wisdom be burnt away, except for the essence of spiritual wisdom. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਥੈ ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਮੇਟਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: maathai jo dhur likhiaa su mett na sakai koe |
lines.english: No one can erase that primal destiny written upon one's forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jo likhiaa so varatadaa so boojhai jis no nadar hoe |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, whatever is written there, comes to pass. He alone understands, who is blessed by God's Grace. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਕੂੜੈ ਲਾਲਚਿ ਲਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa koorrai laalach lag |
lines.english: Those who forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and become attached to greed and fraud,

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa maaeaa mohanee antar tisanaa ag |
lines.english: are engrossed in the entanglements of Maya the enticer, with the fire of desire within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਵੇਲਿ ਨ ਤੂੰਬੜੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਠਗੇ ਠਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa vel na toonbarree maaeaa tthage tthag |
lines.english: Those who, like the pumpkin vine, are too stubborn climb the trellis, are cheated by Maya the cheater.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਭੁਲੀਐ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap bhulaae bhuleeai aape mel milaae |
lines.english: The Lord Himself misleads the misguided ones, and He Himself unites them in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਬੰਨੑਿ ਚਲਾਈਅਹਿ ਨਾ ਮਿਲਹੀ ਵਗਿ ਸਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bana chalaaeeeh naa milahee vag sag |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are bound and gagged and led away; the dogs do not join the herd of cows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਭੀ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: saalaahee saalaahanaa bhee sachaa saalaeh |
lines.english: I praise the Praiseworthy Lord, and sing the Praises of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਜੇ ਚਲੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh chhutteeai je chalai satigur bhaae |6|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are saved; they walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਏਕੁ ਦਰੁ ਬੀਭਾ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਆਹਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa ek dar beebhaa parahar aaeh |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Lord alone is True; stay away from all other doors. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਹ ਜਹ ਮੈ ਫਿਰਉ ਤਹ ਤਹ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jeh jeh mai firau teh teh saachaa soe |
lines.english: O Nanak, wherever I go, I find the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh ek hai guramukh paragatt hoe |8|
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see the One Lord. He reveals Himself to the Gurmukh. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਵਿਸਾਰਣੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਜੇ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dookh visaaran sabad hai je man vasaae koe |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad is the Dispeller of sorrow, if one enshrines it in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਕਰਮ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te man vasai karam paraapat hoe |9|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, it dwells in the mind; by God's Mercy, it is obtained. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤੇ ਖਪਿ ਮੁਏ ਖੂਹਣਿ ਲਖ ਅਸੰਖ ॥
lines.translit: naanak hau hau karate khap mue khoohan lakh asankh |
lines.english: O Nanak, acting in egotism, countless thousands have wasted away to death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਲੰਖ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: satigur mile su ubare saachai sabad alankh |10|
lines.english: Those who meet with the True Guru are saved, through the Shabad, the True Word of the Inscrutable Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਜਨ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa satigur ik man seviaa tin jan laagau paae |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru single-mindedly - I fall at the feet of those humble beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੀ ਭੁਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee har man vasai maaeaa kee bhukh jaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord abides in the mind, and the hunger for Maya departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਊਜਲੇ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: se jan niramal aoojale ji guramukh naam samaae |
lines.english: Immaculate and pure are those humble beings, who, as Gurmukh, merge in the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੋਰਿ ਪਤਿਸਾਹੀਆ ਕੂੜੀਆ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak hor patisaaheea koorreea naam rate paatisaah |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, other empires are false; they alone are true emperors, who are imbued with the Naam. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਪੁਰਖੈ ਘਰਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਨਾਰਿ ਹੈ ਅਤਿ ਲੋਚੈ ਭਗਤੀ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau purakhai ghar bhagatee naar hai at lochai bhagatee bhaae |
lines.english: The devoted wife in her husband's home has a great longing to perform loving devotional service to him;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਰਸ ਸਾਲਣੇ ਸਵਾਰਦੀ ਖਟ ਰਸ ਮੀਠੇ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bahu ras saalane savaaradee khatt ras meetthe paae |
lines.english: she prepares and offers to him all sorts of sweet delicacies and dishes of all flavors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਸਲਾਹਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tiau baanee bhagat salaahade har naamai chit laae |
lines.english: In the same way, the devotees praise the Word of the Guru's Bani, and focus their consciousness on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਗਤੀ ਭਗਤ ਬਹੁ ਲੋਚਦੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਲੋਚਾ ਪੂਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhagatee bhagat bahu lochade prabh lochaa poor milaae |
lines.english: In the Fear of God, His devotees yearn for His devotional worship; God fulfills their desires, and merges them with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਆਗੈ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਸਿਰੁ ਵੇਚਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan dhan aagai raakhiaa sir vechiaa gur aagai jaae |
lines.english: They place mind, body and wealth in offering before the Guru, and sell their heads to Him.
